<summary><strong>2.3.3</strong></summary>

pip install pandas==2.3.3 --index-url https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/56254198/packages/pypi/simple

- **License:** BSD-3-Clause

{: .warning }
> We disable test_rolling_var_numerical_issues. This test is fixed on main
> but not on the 2.3.3 tag. We also patch the build to use Cython 3.1.2
> since 3.2.0 seems to cause issues with pickling data types. See also
> [issue 63078](https://github.com/pandas-dev/pandas/issues/63078).

</details>
